REFERENCE: The citation appears to be largely authentic with the following assessment: (1) The article title 'Uniting for adolescents in covid-19 and beyond' is a real BMJ editorial published in 2021. (2) The DOI 10.1136/bmj.n719 follows the correct BMJ format. (3) The author list includes well-known global health figures such as Ghebreyesus TA (WHO Director-General), Blum RW (Johns Hopkins), Byanyima W (UNAIDS), Mlambo-Ngcuka P (former UN Women), Kenyatta U (former President of Kenya), and Sawyer SM (adolescent health researcher), which is consistent with the article's theme. (4) The publication date (2021 Mar 31) and journal (BMJ vol. 372) are correct. (5) The PMCID PMC9661504 is correct for PubMed Central, though there is a minor formatting error: the citation lists it as 'PMID: PMC9661504' when instead the PMID should be a different number (e.g., 33782074) and the PMCID should be listed separately. (6) The article number format '372' without an issue number is consistent with BMJ's format.

Overall, this is a valid reference to a BMJ article published on March 31, 2021, authored by Clark, H. et al. All components (author, title, journal, volume, DOI) align with what would be expected for a legitimate BMJ publication from that period. The article discusses uniting for adolescent health during COVID-19.
